svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="System Flowchart - Cron tao Recommendation" id="flowchart-335-cron"> <mxGraphModel dx="-899" dy="-277" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1850" pageHeight="940" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="pool_cron" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=20;horizontal=0;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;" value="CRON JOB — Tạo Recommendation (06:00 hằng ngày)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="900" width="1750" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_start" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;outline=standard;symbol=timer;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="CRON START
06:00" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="60" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_loadusers" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Lấy danh sách USERS có
GYM_MEMBERSHIPS.status = 'active'" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="260" x="150" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_foreach" parent="pool_cron" style="points=[[0.25,0.25,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[0.75,0.75,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.25,0.75,0],[0,0.5,0]];shape=mxgraph.bpmn.gateway2;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=rhombusPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;outline=none;symbol=none;gwType=exclusive;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Còn member
chưa xử lý?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="470" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_end" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.event;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=ellipsePerimeter;outlineConnect=0;aspect=fixed;outline=end;symbol=terminate2;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=3;" value="CRON END" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="36" x="580" y="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_loaddata" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Lấy end_date, last_checkin,
plan_id, purchase_history" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="240" x="570" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_fork" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.gateway2;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=rhombusPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;outline=none;symbol=parallel;gwType=parallel;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="870" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_r1" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Rule 1: end_date <= 7 ngày?
→ Có: type='renew_reminder', HIGH" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="970" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_r2" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Rule 2: chưa check-in >= 14 ngày?
→ Có: type='inactive_alert', MEDIUM" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="970" y="125" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_r3" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Rule 3: end_date quá 1-3 ngày?
→ Có: type='renew_reminder', HIGH" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="970" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_r4" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Rule 4: end_date quá > 3 ngày?
→ Có: type='renew_reminder', HIGH" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="970" y="315" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_r5" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Rule 5: check-in >= 4/tuần + Gói Tháng?
→ Có: type='upsell_plan', MEDIUM" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="970" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_r6" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Rule 6: mua nutrition >= 3 lần/tuần?
→ Có: type='upsell_nutrition', LOW" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="970" y="505" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_join" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.gateway2;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=rhombusPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;outline=none;symbol=parallel;gwType=parallel;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="1350" y="295" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_gwdup" parent="pool_cron" style="points=[[0.25,0.25,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[0.75,0.75,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.25,0.75,0],[0,0.5,0]];shape=mxgraph.bpmn.gateway2;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;align=center;perimeter=rhombusPerimeter;outlineConnect=0;outline=none;symbol=none;gwType=exclusive;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Với mỗi candidate:
đã có bản ghi pending
trong 7 ngày gần nhất?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="1450" y="295" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_skip" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=user;fillColor=#ffffff;" value="Bỏ qua,
không tạo trùng lặp" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="190" x="1450" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_insert" parent="pool_cron" style="shape=mxgraph.bpmn.task2;whiteSpace=wrap;rectStyle=rounded;size=10;html=1;container=1;expand=0;collapsible=0;taskMarker=service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="INSERT RECOMMENDATIONS
(member_id, type, priority,
status='pending')" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="250" x="1160" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="c_start" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="c_loadusers" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="c_loadusers" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="c_foreach" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="c_foreach" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="c_end" value="Hết
danh sách"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c_e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="c_foreach" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="c_loaddata" value="Còn"> <mxGeometry relative="1"
